name: FSIL_OnRequest
title: FSIL_OnRequest
syntax: long FSIL_OnRequest( long rqPGN, long sourceAddr );
long FSIL_OnRequest( long rqPGN, long sourceAddr, long destinationAddress );
description: Is called if a request (0xEA00) is received.
The return value defines the node reaction to the request.

parameters.name: sourceAddr
parameters.description: Source address from which the request was sent

parameters.name: destinationAddress
parameters.description: Destination address on which the request was sent

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
